title: PRESCHOOL PROMISE - 211info
text: DOUGLAS EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT PRESCHOOL PROMISE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps locate publicly funded preschools in family care, center, and school settings. Eligible students are matched to sites based on family preference and need. Setting options include days, hours of operation, transportation, primary language, bilingual programs, curriculum, and approach. 1409 NE Diamond Lake Boulevard Suite 110 Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: -Must be ages 3-4 before September 1st of the calendar year -Household income must be below 200% federal poverty level -Must be an Oregon resident -Families receiving SNAP do not need to provide additional income verification -Housing Adjustment: Eligibility Specialists may adjust a family’s gross income calculation when determining eligibility to account for excessive housing costs. This applies to families who do not meet income eligibility but spend more than 30% of their gross income on housing costs Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-4:30pm Email (541) 957-4809 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 957-4809 Intake (458) 710-0902 Vanessa Broadley [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income, proof of address, proof of childs birthdate LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Douglas, Klamath, and Lake Counties Services: Child Care Expense Assistance * Foster Children Child Care Expense Assistance * Preschool Age Children Preschool Referral Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION SERVICES EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - SOUTH-CENTRAL EARLY LEARNING HUB EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME SCHOOLING EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - SPECIAL EDUCATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - TAKE ROOTS PARENTING CONNECTIONS PUBLIC SAFETY - CARE CONNECTIONS AND EDUCATION REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - EARLY INTERVENTION AND EARLY CHILDHOOD SPECIAL EDUCATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DOUGLAS EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT
